Chapter 6: Knowledge Check

10 questions • ~10 minutes

Question 1 of 10
What is the primary risk of hiding pricing behind "contact sales"?
Question 2 of 10
What does an AI procurement analyst do BEFORE contacting a vendor?
Question 3 of 10
Which type of value claim is most likely to be cited by AI?
Question 4 of 10
What makes packaging "defensible" in the AI era?
Question 5 of 10
What does AI flag as a "strategic risk" in vendor evaluation?
Question 6 of 10
Which transparency strategy helps procurement AI validate budgets?
Question 7 of 10
What type of markup makes pricing machine-readable?
Question 8 of 10
What's the "citation test" for value claims?
Question 9 of 10
Which third-party validation carries significant weight with AI?
Question 10 of 10
What triggers "complexity risk" flags in AI analysis?
0/10
Great job!
You passed the Chapter 6 quiz.
